phases.name: pkg
phases.prompt: Write 'package.json' for a tiny Express web service named 'dockerized-node-app'. It must declare express as a dependency, set "main" to "server.js", and define a "start" script that runs "node server.js". Output ONLY the complete contents of package.json inside a single ```json code block, nothing else.

phases.name: server
dockerfile
compose
dockerignore
phases.prompt: Write a '.dockerignore' for the Node project above. It must at least ignore node_modules, npm-debug.log, and the .git directory. Output ONLY the complete contents of .dockerignore inside a single ```text code block, nothing else.

phases.name: readme

scorers.rubric: README.md documents the dockerized Node/Express service and gives correct instructions for both running it locally with node and building/running it via Docker and docker compose, consistent with the provided files.
